programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.desc: Pedro brings Sophie to meet his mom and sister; things get heated as Nicole and Lidia cross the line with Sophie; Kim and Jamal meet up with Larry, where Kim reveals another secret; Gino has surprising news for Natalie when she arrives in Michigan.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.desc: Debbie arrives to try and fix things between Cortney and Colt; Vanja's trip to Maine turns toxic when Sanela grills Tony; Sophie questions if she's ready for a relationship with Pedro; Kim is ready to find the daughter she placed for adoption.

programme.desc: Sophie and Liz meet up following their blow up, and Liz reveals a secret connection back home. Vanja is worried about Tony's recent controlling behavior. Colt attempts to smooth things over with Diana. Gino and Natalie take things to the bedroom.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Some things just can't be anticipated, and when the unexpected happens, we often wish someone had caught it on camera; now our houses do; from unusual encounters to sudden shocks and funny freakouts, these people were caught by surprise and scared silly.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Just because the lights go out doesn't mean the cameras stop recording; stay up late to witness the hilarious, surprising, and bizarre behavior that takes place after dark...because when the sun goes down, the neighborhood gets wild.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: At just 18 years old, Loren was involved in a catastrophic forklift accident; to save his life, doctors cut him in half; Sofia was an active 29-year-old when her heart went into end-stage failure; now she must be plugged-in to stay alive.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Actor Tyriq Withers (Colleen Hoover film adaptation "Reminders of Him"); Courtney Austin, a deaf medical student about to graduate, formed a life-changing bond with Dr. Ebone Bady, a pediatric ENT surgeon; their mentorship went viral as they showed that disabilities are not limitations and that accessibility in medicine matters.

programme.desc: Phil takes Jay on an unconventional fishing trip; Gloria wonders how to break the news about her pregnancy; Dylan temporarily moves in with the Dunphys; Cam and Mitch think about adopting a cat.

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives
programme.desc: Hattie, a 76-year-old cougar, has been dating younger men for more than 20 years; Stephanie, 65, lost her husband unexpectedly and has since sworn to date only younger men; Jude, 53, has fallen in love with her daughter's junior-high boyfriend.

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives
programme.desc: Jane and her 27-year-old husband are Civil War reenactors; Loma wears leopard print bras and blonde wigs; Sheri has found her soul mate in a 26-year-old.

programme.title: Extreme Cougar Wives
programme.sub-title: I'm Here to Inspire, Not Expire!
programme.desc: Kathy, 54, dates a 25-year-old; Jeraldine created "The Love Boat" series and at 90 years old enjoys life with her Latin lover; Gale found happiness with a man who is closer in age to her teen daughter.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: A woman misses her period but a home pregnancy test is negative, so she thinks it must be the stress of her upcoming wedding until a few months later when she is shocked to find herself delivering a baby girl while on the toilet.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: After returning home from spring break, a college freshman begins to suffer painful back cramps but does not realize she's pregnant until she gives birth to a boy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: After spending a day with her family riding roller coasters at a theme park, a woman suddenly feels exhausted and nauseous, begins having cramps, heads to the bathroom, and gives birth to a baby boy on the floor.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
